name: Cottage Cheese Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (8 ounce) package noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 12 servings - 1/2 cup each
1. In a non-stick skillet, cook carrots, onion, and margarine over medium heat until tender.
2. Add mushrooms and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Set aside.
Assembly:
3. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (except parsley) with the cooked vegetables.
4. Transfer the mixture into a 2-quart non-stick casserole dish.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
6. Garnish with parsley before serving, if desired.
Note: Each serving may be exchanged for one bread item and one low-fat meat option.
